headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Lennar, Lowers Price Target to $105
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Jade Rahmani   maintains Lennar (NYSE:LEN) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $115 to $105.
